injuries.name: Onyeka Okongwu
injuries.description: Apr 19: Okongwu is questionable for Monday's Game 2 against the Knicks due to right knee inflammation.

injuries.name: OG Anunoby
injuries.description: Apr 19: Anunoby (ankle) is listed as probable for Monday's game against the Hawks.

injuries.name: Mark Williams
injuries.description: Apr 20: Williams (foot) won't play in Sunday's game against Oklahoma City, Clemente Almanza of USA Today reports.

injuries.name: Jordan Goodwin
injuries.description: Apr 19: Goodwin has been ruled out for the rest of Game 1 against the Thunder on Sunday due to left calf soreness, Duane Rankin of The Arizona Republic reports.

injuries.name: Jordan McLaughlin
injuries.description: Apr 20: McLaughlin (ankle) is out for Sunday's Game 1 against the Trail Blazers.
